steps.title: Identify the exponential form
steps.content: The ball starts at $22$ feet, so the initial value is $22$. After each bounce, the height is $85\%$ of the previous height, so the multiplier is $0.85$.

steps.title: Write the function
steps.content: After $n$ bounces, the initial height is multiplied by $0.85$ a total of $n$ times: $$h(n)=22(0.85)^n.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A uses $0.22$ as the multiplier. Choice C uses the wrong initial height and wrong multiplier. Choice D uses the wrong initial height. Choice B has initial value $22$ and multiplier $0.85$, so B is correct.
